description_long: This is a modern, linear kitchen base cabinet unit with a dark, marble-patterned countertop and a sleek, minimalist design. The front face features integrated appliances, including a built-in oven and a dishwasher, as well as a stainless steel sink with a single-lever faucet. The cabinetry is finished in a light, neutral color, likely a matte or satin laminate, with clean, handle-less doors and drawers for a contemporary look. The countertop extends the full length of the unit, providing ample workspace, while the appliances are seamlessly integrated for a streamlined appearance. The back and side panels are plain, emphasizing the unit's functional front. This type of cabinetry is typically found in urban kitchens, communal spaces, or break rooms.
description: A modern, linear kitchen base cabinet with a dark marble countertop, integrated oven, dishwasher, and a stainless steel sink with a single-lever faucet. The design is sleek and handle-less, with a light-colored finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the integrated oven, dishwasher, sink, and faucet, with the marble countertop and handle-less cabinetry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the unit and the overhanging countertop edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back panel of the cabinetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the edge of the countertop and sink.
